testCases.scenario: Should validate customer registration flow
Should validate caterer registration & license upload
Should validate admin approval for pending caterers
Should validate end-to-end customer order flow (Search -> Menu -> Cart -> Checkout)
Should execute Swipe, Scroll, Tap, and Long Press gestures
Should verify bottom navigation tabs and back button behavior
